Kazi Meherunnesa Eva
Research Assistant · NLP & ML Lab, DIU

CS graduate specializing in NLP, ML, and AI-driven systems. Published at IEEE ICCCNT 2025. Currently pursuing MSc in Data Science at Daffodil International University.

Download CV ResearchGate ↗ LinkedIn ↗

About

I'm a researcher and CS graduate from Daffodil International University, Dhaka, working at the intersection of language and AI. My research focuses on building models that understand code-mixed Banglish text — a language variety spoken by millions but underrepresented in NLP. I'm currently a Research Assistant in the DIU NLP & ML Lab, contributing to peer-reviewed publications and mentoring undergraduate students. My broader interests include Explainable AI, healthcare AI, and scalable ML deployment.

Skills

  • Mentoring undergraduate students in ML and NLP projects and research methodology.
2024 – 2025
Undergraduate Thesis Researcher
Daffodil International University
  • Developed a novel emotion classification dataset for code-mixed Banglish text with verified annotation consistency.
  • Collaborated with psychology domain experts to design and validate emotion annotation guidelines.
